description: EAST HARTFORD GAZETTETHURS APRIL 5 A Kefauver Stevenson Ticket Supporters of Senator Estes Kefauver have reacted warmly to questions whether the Ten nessee Senator would accept Adlai Stevenson as a VicePresidential nominee on the ticket with him The idea is that Kefauver would be the Presidential nominee and Stevenson his run ning mate This is certainly an interesting ques tion and an unusual turn of events It will be remembered that in 1952 Kefau ver would probably have accepted the second spot on the ticket with Stevenson Stevenson had the Presidential nomination in the bag and Ke fauver had made a good fight but had lost It was no secret in Chicago that he would probably have been receptive to an opportunity to ran with Stevenson as the second man on the ticket But the Democratic Party squeldhed Kefau ver completely and even embarrassed him when he attempted to get on the platform to speak after his candidacy failed Now in an atmos phere of glee resulting from Kefauvers victor ies over Stevenson in New Hampshire and Min nesota Kefauvers supporters say they might accept Stevenson in the second place spotif he demonstrates an ability to draw votes This is
